parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant AbstractApplicationContext
participant GenericApplicationContext
participant ApplicationContextAwareProcessor
participant AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory
participant DefaultListableBeanFactory

note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 以下流程都在refresh()方法内部
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 第1步
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: 1 prepareRefresh
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 空方法,留给子类重写
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: initPropertySources()
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: getEnvironment()
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: validateRequiredProperties()
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 泛型ApplicationEvent
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: new LinkedHashSet<>()

note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 第2步
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: 2 obtainFreshBeanFactory()
AbstractApplicationContext -> GenericApplicationContext: refreshBeanFactory()
GenericApplicationContext -> GenericApplicationContext: new DefaultListableBeanFactory()
GenericApplicationContext -> GenericApplicationContext: setSerializationId(getId())
GenericApplicationContext --> AbstractApplicationContext: 未定义变量接收返回值
AbstractApplicationContext -> GenericApplicationContext: getBeanFactory
GenericApplicationContext --> AbstractApplicationContext: 返回 DefaultListableBeanFactory

note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 第3步
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: 3 prepareBeanFactory
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 设置BeanFactory的类加载器、支持表达式解析器
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 添加Bean后置处理器 例如
AbstractApplicationContext -> ApplicationContextAwareProcessor: addBeanPostProcessor(new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(this))
ApplicationContextAwareProcessor -> ApplicationContextAwareProcessor: 构造器
ApplicationContextAwareProcessor --> AbstractApplicationContext: 返回 ApplicationContextAwareProcessor
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 设置忽略的自动装配的接口 例如
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory: ignoreDependencyInterface(ApplicationEventPublisherAware.class)
AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory -> AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory: ignoredDependencyInterfaces.add(ifc)
AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory --> AbstractApplicationContext: 未定义变量接收返回值
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 注册可以解析的自动装配 例如
AbstractApplicationContext -> DefaultListableBeanFactory: registerResolvableDependency(BeanFactory.class, beanFactory)
note left of DefaultListableBeanFactory: params { dependencyType, autowiredValue }
DefaultListableBeanFactory -> DefaultListableBeanFactory: resolvableDependencies.put();
DefaultListableBeanFactory --> AbstractApplicationContext: 未定义变量接收返回值
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 添加ApplicationListenerDetector的Bean后置处理器
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 添加编译时的AspectJ ;
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 给BeanFactory中注册一些能用的组件
AbstractApplicationContext -> DefaultListableBeanFactory: registerSingleton(ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_PROPERTIES_BEAN_NAME) / SYSTEM_ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME)
note left of DefaultListableBeanFactory: params{beanName, singletonObject}
DefaultListableBeanFactory -> DefaultListableBeanFactory: addSingleton();
DefaultListableBeanFactory --> AbstractApplicationContext: 未定义变量接收返回值

note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 第4步
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 在应用程序上下文的标准初始化之后修改其内部bean工厂
note left of AbstractApplicationContext: 空方法 留给子类重写
AbstractApplicationContext -> AbstractApplicationContext: postProcessBeanFactory(beanFactory);

@enduml
```
